narrative:
Liberty Township has 3,359 registered voters, with 55.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.7 percentage points.
